page.title: Email
page.intro: Send invoices, reminders, and payment thank-yous from {business}'s own domain. Powered by Resend; bring your own API key.

config.heading: Email config
config.apiKeyHasValuePlaceholder: (saved — paste a new key to replace)
config.apiKeyHint: Sign up at resend.com (free tier covers 3,000 emails/month) and create an API key. The key is encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM; only the messaging module can decrypt.
config.fromEmailHint: Must use a verified domain (configure below).
config.replyToEmailHint: Where customer replies land — usually your real mailbox (e.g. marcus@malcom.io).
config.dailyCapHint: Sent today: {sent} / {cap}. Caps abuse if a key is compromised.
config.signatureHint: Auto-appended below every invoice email body. Use plain text — line breaks are preserved.
config.testSent: Test email sent — check your inbox.

domain.heading: Verified domains
domain.intro: Add your domain so emails come from your address (info@malcom.io) instead of a generic sender. Add the DNS records below to your domain registrar, then click Verify.
domain.added: Domain added — add the DNS records, then verify.
domain.needsApiKey: Save an API key before adding a domain.
domain.empty: No domains added yet. Add one to start sending.
domain.recordsIntro: Add these records to your DNS, then click Verify.

intro.invoice_send: Default subject + body for the email that delivers a new invoice. Customizable per send.
intro.invoice_reminder: Default subject + body for late-invoice reminders (Phase 2).
intro.payment_thanks: Default subject + body for the thank-you email when a payment lands (Phase 3).

template.variablesIntro: Wrap any of these in % signs to insert at send time.

send.modalSubtitle: Review the email before it goes to your customer.
send.subject: Subject
send.previewMissingConfig: Email isn't configured yet. Visit /teams/{teamId}/email to set up.
send.previewMissingDomain: From address {address} isn't on a verified domain. Visit /teams/{teamId}/email to verify.
